{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":10}","has_more":true,"total":56},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7219348408174248741","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的太合我的口味了，我认为你写的很对，旧党和新党不需要分的太清，只要能为百姓做好事就是好的，这书太合我胃口了，推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680885730,"group_id":"7198118271705418789","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzdwTQeTH8u1Lwb4jhxhnDQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"94818597417","user_name":"爱吃炸紫薯条的齐东强"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"94818597417","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7198118271705418789","book_info":{"abstract":"青年历史老师赵籍不小心穿越了。穿越到水浒世界，成为宋徽宗赵佶。赵籍当皇帝，只干三件事：赚大钱、挖人才、谈恋爱。为了养“国”糊口，他实行宋朝版改革开放，推动经济发展……为了招揽人才，他提拔晁盖、宋江、林冲、杨志、武松……当皇帝的业余时间，他还和一代才女李清照、绝色佳人李师师谈情说爱，缓解工作压力（水浒穿越小说，仅供阅读娱乐）。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9169e26c512de8f62d62a4154d64846b","author":"笔走天涯","author_id":"","book_id":"7198118271705418789","book_name":"穿越水浒之开局当皇帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#500800","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"
